sub_modules.conv3d_coord_decode: Combinational decoder from flattened stream index to depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-window detector for valid-padding stride-1 convolution positions.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_extract: Combinational 3x3x3 sliding-window packer from buffered voxel taps and the current input voxel.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate unit for the flattened 3D convolution window and kernel.
